research_question: Test whether removing the liquidity component from the weak baseline score reduces low-liquidity dependence and improves robustness under TopK perturbation and cost stress.
result_interpretation_rule: Exploratory challenger round: compare fixed-test audit outputs against the weak baseline without making a promotion claim.
time_partition_plan: Reuse the current fullchain exploratory snapshot and run-state inputs; no validation-budget consumption claimed.
notes: This challenger changes exactly one core dimension: remove liquidity_20d_raw from score composition.
TopK, entry_tradeable timing, execution semantics, benchmark choice, and cost parameters must remain unchanged.
This round is exploratory and should not consume validation budget or enter walk-forward.
